_comment: REQUIRED: After Bubblewrap generates your signing key (during `bubblewrap init`), it prints a SHA-256 fingerprint. Replace the placeholder below with that fingerprint, then host this file at https://YOUR-DOMAIN.com/.well-known/assetlinks.json so Google can verify your app owns the domain. Without this, the TWA falls back to showing a Chrome browser bar at the top instead of running fullscreen.
